subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath cast away that which the people possess and taken that which hath been vouchsafed unto him from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Wise. Grieve not over aught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن نبذ ما عند الناس و اخذ ما اوتی به من لدن عزیز حکیم لاتحزن عن شیء و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
